name: CVD EQUIPMENT CORP
summary: CVD Equipment Corporation designs, develops, and manufactures chemical vapor deposition (CVD), physical vapor transport (PVT), and thermal process equipment for aerospace, semiconductor, compound semiconductor, and battery energy storage markets. Products include CVI systems for ceramic matrix composites, PVT150/PVT200 silicon carbide crystal growth systems, and CVD systems for battery anode materials. Its SDC division manufactures ultra-high purity gas and chemical delivery control systems. The company serves commercial companies, universities, and research laboratories worldwide.
